title: BuildCraft Refabricated
description: Unofficial Fabric port of BuildCraft, bringing pipes, engines, quarry, oil, gates, and automation to modern Minecraft
body:
# BuildCraft Refabricated

**The classic BuildCraft automation experience, rebuilt for Fabric on Minecraft.**

![A row of various industrial machines and blocks from the BuildCraft mod placed side-by-side in a Minecraft world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a03bcc490d6707e53dc973bf8db77ecb5e050b.png)

BuildCraft Refabricated is an unofficial Fabric port of **BuildCraft**, one of the mods that defined Minecraft automation. Mine with quarries, pump and refine oil, power everything with engines, move resources through smart pipes, and automate it all with programmable gates. The full BuildCraft toolkit, faithful to the 8.0.x era, rebuilt for modern Fabric.

If you ever piped items across your base, watched a quarry chew through stone, or wired up gates to run a factory on its own, this is that experience. And now it plugs straight into the rest of your Fabric modpack.

## Requirements & Version Support

| Minecraft Version | Support Status | Fabric Loader | Fabric API | Java |
|-------------------|----------------|------------|------------|------|
| **26.2**| 🟢 **Active** (Upstream) | ≥ 0.19.3 | ≥ 0.152.1+26.2 | 25+ |
| **26.1.x** | 🟢 **Active** (Long term support) | ≥ 0.19.3 | ≥ 0.150.0+26.1.2 | 25+ |
| **1.21.11** | 🟡 **Maintenance** (Best effort)  | ≥ 0.19.3 | ≥ 0.141.4+1.21.11 | 21+ |
| **1.21.10** | 🟡 **Maintenance** (Best effort)  | ≥ 0.19.3 | ≥ 0.138.4+1.21.10 | 21+ |
| **1.21.1** | 🟡 **Planned** | ≥ 0.19.3 | ≥ 0.116.12+1.21.1 | 21+ |
| **<1.21.1** | 🔴 **Not supported and not planned**  | | | |


## Gameplay by module

### Factory & Mining: automate the world
Mining and processing in BuildCraft is completely hands-off. Mark out areas, supply power, and let the machines do the heavy lifting:

- **Quarry**: strip mines an entire marked region down to bedrock, piping every block of loot straight into your storage. Set it, power it, walk away.
- **Mining Well**: drills a clean shaft straight down, perfect for targeted vertical mining.
- **Pump**: drains lakes, lava pools, and oil deposits into your fluid network.
- **Flood Gate**: the exact opposite of a pump—smoothly fills ravines or custom tanks with any fluid.
- **Tanks**: stackable, massive multiblock fluid storage for your oil and fuel reserves.
- **Auto Workbench**: supply ingredients via pipes to automate standard crafting recipes.
- **Chute**: precisely drops piped items into the world.

### Oil & Energy: a full economy
BuildCraft features a complete energy loop running on its iconic unit, **Minecraft Joules (MJ)**:

- **Oil & Springs**: crude oil pools generate across the world, waiting to be tapped.
- **Distiller / Refinery**: refine crude oil into a three-tier fuel chain. Each tier burns hotter and longer.
- **Engines**: 
  - **Redstone Engine**: a cheap early-game kickstart for pumping and light work.
  - **Stone & Iron Engines**: mid-tier power that scales with fuel quality, requiring water cooling to prevent overheating.
  - **Combustion Engine**: massive output power for your biggest machines.
  - **Creative & FE Engines**: for testing and cross-tech pack setups.

### Pipes & Logistics: the transport network
Build sprawling logistics networks that sort, route, and deliver resources with zero hoppers:

- **Wooden** pipes extract from inventories; **Cobblestone, Stone, and Quartz** pipes carry items along at varying speeds.
- **Iron** pipes force items in a single direction; **Diamond** pipes sort items by type into different outputs.
- **Emerald** pipes smart-extract with filters; **Lapis / Daizuli** pipes route items by painted colour.
- **Obsidian** pipes act as vacuums, sucking up dropped items from the world.
- **Sandstone** pipes only connect to other pipes, neatly ignoring nearby inventories.
- **Void** pipes safely delete excess items, fluids, or energy.
- **Striped** pipes interact with the world, placing blocks or using items as if they were a player.
- **Fluid & Kinesis pipes**: carry liquids and MJ power across your base to distant machines.

### Gates, Wires & Triggers: program your factory
This is where BuildCraft becomes a living, breathing factory:

- **Gates** read the world: "is this tank full?", "is this engine too hot?", "is this chest empty?" They fire **actions** in response.
- **Redstone wires** link gates together into reactive, self-regulating networks.
- Turn machines on and off exactly when needed. No command blocks, no complex scripting—just satisfying, intuitive in-world logic.

### Builders: construction at scale
Move, copy, and construct buildings using MJ:

- **Architect Table**: scans any structure in the world into a reusable blueprint.
- **Builder**: reconstructs your blueprints anywhere, provided you supply the materials.
- **Filler**: clears, flattens, or fills entire marked regions on command.
- **Blueprint Library**: store, manage, and share your favourite blueprints across different worlds.

### Robotics: your automated drone fleet
Take automation to the skies with programmable flying robots to handle dynamic tasks pipes can't reach:

- **Docking Station**: the home base and charging port for your robots.
- **Zone Planner & Map Location**: map out exact 3D working areas for your fleet.
- **Robots**: deploy specialized drones like the **Lumberjack, Miner, Planter, Picker, and Transporter** to automatically manage tree farms, gather drops, and move resources dynamically around your base.

### Silicon: advanced crafting
- **Assembly Table & Integration Table**: use laser beams to craft gates, chipsets, and advanced pipe wires.
- **Advanced Crafting Table**: uses laser power to instantly craft complex standard recipes.
- **Facades and Lenses**: hide your pipes behind blocks or add functional beam control to your networks.

### Quality of life tools
- **Paintbrush**: colour-code pipes and blocks for tidy, readable factories.
- **Landmarks, Path Markers & Volume Boxes**: precisely define working areas for quarries, fillers, and builders.
- **List tool**: configure filters quickly and uniformly across your network.

## Plays well with your other mods

BuildCraft Refabricated is built to be a **team player**, not an isolated tech island:

- **Native Fabric Transfer API support**: pipes and machines move items and fluids in and out of *any* mod that uses the standard Fabric storage APIs. Drop a BC pipe onto another mod's tank, barrel, or machine and it just connects.
- **Cross mod energy**: built in **Team Reborn Energy (E)** integration bridges BuildCraft to the wider tech ecosystem, with enabled by default MJ ↔ E conversion.
- **Modded fluids interoperate**: any mod's fluids flow through BC pipes, tanks, pumps, and the distiller using standard fluid units.
- **JEI integration**: every BuildCraft recipe shows up in JEI alongside the rest of your pack.

Whether your pack leans on storage drawers, modded tanks, E generators, or other logistics systems, BuildCraft slots in as the connective tissue between them.

## Credits & license

- Original **BuildCraft** by SpaceToad and the [BuildCraft Team](https://github.com/BuildCraft/BuildCraft).
- **Modern 26.1.2 gameplay base derived from [legoj15's NeoForge port](https://github.com/legoj15/BuildCraft)**.
- Fabric port and maintenance: [fromdisposition/BuildCraftRefabricated](https://github.com/fromdisposition/BuildCraftRefabricated).

Licensed under **MPL-2.0**. This is an **unofficial** port and is not affiliated with the original BuildCraft Team.
